subcodes.first_line: O Abu-Talib! Hearken unto My call from My direction, then stand firm in My love, then be stirred by the breezes of My rapture, and arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ابوطالب اسمع ندائی عن شطری ثم استقم علی حبی ثم اهتز من نفحات جذبی ثم قم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @praise and encouragement, @methods of teaching the Cause, @exhortations and counsels
